title: Unrestricted `mintAllocatedShares` lets anyone steal unclaimed deposit shares
reason: `mintAllocatedShares` calls `mint`, and `mint` enforces `onlyVaultOrQueue`; internal call preserves original `msg.sender`, so arbitrary EOAs cannot mint allocated shares.

title: Permissionless implementation proposals enable unbounded factory state-bloat griefing
reason: Primarily spam/storage-growth nuisance paid by attacker; no realistic protocol-level fund loss, insolvency, lockup, or permissionless core-flow DoS demonstrated.

title: Transfer whitelist logic is inverted allowing unauthorized transfers
reason: Duplicate of existing F-003 with no material new evidence.

title: Protocol fee can be minted multiple times per period across different assets
reason: Duplicate of existing F-007 with no material improvement.

title: Claimable shares calculation is O(n*m) gas-prohibitive with many queues/assets
reason: View-path gas concern is lower impact and substantially overlaps existing F-005 state-changing liveness issue.

title: Claim loop in ShareModule.claimShares has quadratic gas growth
reason: Duplicate/overlap of existing F-005, which already captures the impactful transfer-path liveness failure from the same nested iteration pattern.
